thinks.think: Centered white text displays "- Nintendo -" on the top line with "Presents" directly underneath on a solid black background. During this interval, the bright white lettering quickly fades away, diminishing in opacity until only a faint, ghostly trace remains visible against the dark screen.

Following the fade to black, a title screen appears featuring the text "SUPER MARIO WORLD" in large, multi-colored, bubbly letters centered on a black background. Beneath the logo sits a white egg with green spots. The scene is framed by a border of tan stone blocks, and small blue copyright text reading "1990-1991 Nintendo" is visible at the bottom.

The black background transitions to a bright outdoor scene with blue sky, grey mountain, green bushes, and brown ground. A small figure in red overalls stands left while an orange dinosaur-like creature appears right, replacing the white egg. A menu overlay lists save slots "MARIO A", "MARIO B", "MARIO C", and "ERASE DATA" with a red cursor arrow.

The menu text overlay changes to display "1 PLAYER GAME" and "2 PLAYER GAME" with a red arrow cursor pointing to the top option. The colorful title logo and outdoor background scene remain visible for a moment before the entire screen rapidly fades into deep darkness, obscuring most details until only faint outlines remain against the black background.

The dark screen fades into a bright overhead map labeled "YOSHI'S HOUSE" at the top. A small figure in red overalls appears on a path surrounded by green hills and blue water. The figure is then shown riding a white dinosaur-like creature, while a counter reading "x3" appears near the top left corner next to a small icon.

The map header text updates to "YOSHI'S ISLAND 1" while the small figure in red overalls stands alone on the path, separated from the white dinosaur. Finally, the view cuts to a black background featuring the centered yellow text "MARIO START !".

The map cuts to black with yellow text 'MARIO START !'. The view shifts to a side-scrolling scene with a character in red overalls on grass. A display appears at the top showing lives, score, time, and coins. On the right, an orange enemy sits on a dirt slope before large blue hills.

The character in red overalls jumps into the air while the timer counts down from 300. The orange enemy moves from the dirt slope to the ground, appearing flattened. A gold coin appears on the far right edge as the character travels rightward across the grassy terrain.

The character in red overalls lands on the grass and runs right. A gold coin floating near a blue pillar disappears, updating the top-right display to show one coin and 1000 points. The timer decreases to 294. The flattened orange enemy is no longer visible as the character moves forward across the green terrain.

A large black cannon structure with a red mouth and white teeth appears on the left side. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass to the right. The character in red overalls jumps into the air. The timer at the top counts down from 293 to 291 seconds.

A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the left grass while a winged question block floats above. The character in red overalls runs rightward. The floating block is replaced by a brown square, and the enemy is no longer visible as the timer reaches 289 seconds.

The character in red overalls jumps to strike a floating brown block, causing a red mushroom with white spots to emerge. As the character collects the mushroom, the number 1000 flashes above their head, and their sprite instantly grows larger while the timer decreases to 286.

The larger character in red moves slightly right across the grass. A large green pipe emerges diagonally from the bottom right corner. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands atop this pipe, while another identical enemy appears on the far left side of the screen. The timer counts down from 284 to 282 seconds.

The large character in red overalls moves from the grass to stand atop the rim of the diagonal green pipe. The blue dinosaur-like enemy previously on the pipe is now standing on the grass to the left of the structure. The timer counts down from 282 to 281 seconds as the character balances on the pipe.

The large character in red overalls jumps from the green pipe towards the right, hovering above a dirt slope near a floating gold coin. Two blue dinosaur-like enemies stand on separate brown hills below as the timer decreases from 281 to 279 seconds against a blue sky background.

The large character in red overalls leaps rightward through the air toward a floating gold coin. Below, blue dinosaur-like enemies stand on brown dirt slopes. The timer counts down from 279 to 276 seconds as the figure traverses the gap between the hills against a blue sky background.

The large character in red lands on the grass as a red mushroom with white spots floats in the air above. To the right, a blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the ground while the timer counts down from 275 to 272 seconds against a backdrop of blue hills and white clouds.

The large character collects the floating red mushroom, updating the top item box to show a mushroom icon and increasing the score to 3000. A red Piranha Plant with white spots emerges from a purple pipe on the right side. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass to the left as the character runs forward.

The large character in red stands beside the purple pipe as the red spotted plant enemy retracts into it. Gold coins appear vertically on the far right edge. The blue dinosaur-like enemy is partially visible on the far left. The timer counts down from 259 to 258 seconds.

The large character in red descends from a high jump near a vertical column of gold coins. A red spotted plant enemy sits on a white platform to the left. The character lands near a small purple pipe as a green pipe entrance appears on the bottom right. The timer counts down from 265 to 263 seconds.

The character in red overalls jumps onto a large diagonal green pipe. Two smaller vertical green pipes appear on the ground to the right. A vertical column of grey stone blocks is positioned above the diagonal pipe. The timer counts down from 262 to 260 seconds while the character ascends the green structure.

The character in red overalls moves from the diagonal green pipe to the ground, standing beside a small purple pipe. A vertical line of gold coins floats above. The diagonal green pipe is visible to the right, and a blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the far right edge of the grass. The in-game timer counts down from 259 to 257 seconds.

The character in red overalls moves from the ground near a small purple pipe up onto the large diagonal green pipe. A vertical column of gold coins hangs in the air above, while a blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass at the far right edge of the screen.

The scene transitions from the game to a real-world view of a person with long dark hair in a white hooded jacket sitting on a stool. They watch the game on a TV set placed on a stand with a console underneath, while a shelf with dark items hangs on the wall above in the dim room.

A person with long dark hair sits on a wooden stool wearing a white hooded jacket, facing a television screen. The TV displays a video game with blue blocky graphics. A shelf with dark objects is mounted on the wall above the television. The room remains dimly lit as the person watches the screen.

The person with long dark hair in a white hooded jacket continues sitting on the wooden stool facing the television. The screen displays a video game level with blue structures and white dots. The room remains dimly lit with a shelf visible above the TV, and the viewer's posture is largely unchanged.

A person with long dark hair in a white hooded jacket remains seated on a stool facing a television screen. The video game displayed shows blue vertical structures and white dots, with a clearer heads-up display visible at the top indicating a time of 279. The dimly lit room features a shelf with dark objects mounted on the wall above the television set.

The person with long dark hair in a white hooded jacket continues sitting on the wooden stool facing the television. The screen displays the video game level with blue structures and white dots. The room remains dimly lit with the shelf visible above the TV, showing no significant movement or environmental changes from the previous moment.

The person in the white hooded jacket remains seated on the stool facing the television screen displaying the game. A second individual wearing a light-colored shirt appears on the left side of the frame, standing near the television stand and leaning slightly forward towards the screen.

A second individual in a light grey button-down shirt stands upright to the left of the television, observing the screen. The person in the white hooded jacket remains seated on the stool. The game footage shows a character in red overalls near blue dinosaur-like enemies on a grassy field.

The individual in the light grey shirt sits down on the left, gesturing with their hands while facing slightly right. The person in the white hooded jacket remains seated on the stool to the right, continuing to watch the television screen which displays the video game with blue structures.

The individual in the light grey shirt lowers their hands from a gesturing position, appearing to hold a controller while seated on the left. The person in the white hooded jacket remains seated on the stool to the right, facing the television screen which continues to display blue blocky structures and white dots.

The individual in the light grey shirt remains seated on the left, facing the television screen. The person in the white hooded jacket sits on the wooden stool to the right, turning their head slightly left toward the other individual. The television continues to display the video game with blue structures.

The individual in the light grey shirt stands up from the left and leans forward toward the seated person in the white hoodie. Both extend their arms toward each other, leaning in closely until their upper bodies and faces meet in an embrace in front of the television.

The standing individual in the grey shirt and the seated person in the white hoodie lean forward, wrapping their arms around each other's necks and shoulders. They press their faces together in a close embrace directly in front of the television, which continues displaying the blue video game graphics in the background.

The individual in the grey shirt and jeans continues to kiss the person in the white hoodie, who remains seated on the stool. Their arms are locked around each other's necks and shoulders in a tight embrace. The television screen in the background continues to display the blue video game interface, partially blocked by their bodies.

The individual in the grey shirt continues to hold and kiss the person in the white hoodie seated on the stool. Their bodies remain pressed together in a tight embrace. The television screen behind them shows blue game graphics, partially blocked by the couple. The standing person leans forward while the seated person keeps arms around the other's neck.

The individual in the grey shirt and jeans continues to embrace and kiss the person in the white hoodie seated on the stool. Their bodies remain pressed together in front of the television, which displays blue game graphics. Arms stay locked around necks and waists as the couple maintains their position.

The individual in the grey shirt maintains a standing embrace with the seated person in the white hoodie. Their faces remain pressed together in a kiss while arms stay wrapped around necks and waists. The television screen behind them continues to display blue video game graphics, partially obscured by their bodies.
